text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after the group starts practicing...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-h-h-here I go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ahh! D-Doto! Run off in a hurry like that and you'll—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohh... Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'm so sorry, I can't believe I tripped again... This practice isn't helping anyone, is it? I'm really sorry!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: D-don't sweat it! I'm sure you'll get the hang of it tomorrow, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But... I haven't gotten a single card since we started practicing...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
All I've managed to do is bring you tumbling down with me, and send
a random card flying at the other two...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That was quite the thrilling experience! This overlord almost got a
card to her beautiful face!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: We had to stop, drop, and roll—it was so fun!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohh... I always have to screw things up for everyone... I really am just a nuisance...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, the tournament's not looking so good... I'll screw
something up and we'll go home without a single win...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(My resolution is supposed to be making others happy, but it might
just be another year of making them annoyed...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, I can't let that happen... Um, I-I'm going to go practice a little
more!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wha? Where are you—Doto?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. Fickle as a feather in the wind... It seems my partner has
left me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... In that case, I think I shall take my leave. The new year must
begin with a grand show, and there is much to prepare!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Opera O too? Aw, c'mon, I thought we could all head back
together.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Well, they're both gone now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I wonder if Doto's all right. It's not like we need to win, so I
hope she's not being too hard on herself...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, we don't need to win? Why not?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Because Shiraoki didn't tell us "You better win!" or anything. In this
kind of event, it's having fun that matters most.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, playing karuta with friends is fun! Which is why I think winning
would be even more fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wouldn't you be happy if we won together? I would, and that's why I
want to win!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
AAAAGHH! Your motivations are too pure! It's blinding! Blinding, I
say!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Blinding? Oh, there's some shade over there! Wanna move?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No, don't mind me! ...Anyways, let's call it a day. More practice awaits
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
(If we win, it'll be more fun... So simple, and yet... Urara never fails to
amaze.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Wonder if Doto and her team are still practicing...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
This past year, me being such a screwup has caused you a bunch of
trouble, so...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I want to bring happiness to you too!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sorry, but I'll pass.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I could use a breather...
Sob... Listen for the poem, then run!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No running into people. Listen to Opera O's orders, and... and what
else?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What kind of practice could make me any better? Ohh, why am I always so useless and clumsy...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: B-but, I have to do this! O-one more try!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Doto... What are you doing?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Ayabe... Well, you see, I... I'm practicing on my own, like a solo
boot camp kinda...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I... I'm dragging everyone down again, and... Ooohhh, I'm never going
to change, am I...
